violations.description: THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods (Fish) noted not being thawed in unopened packages.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food was observed being stored in an area where it may be exposed to dampness splash dust or other contamination. Walkin cooler condenser dripping on the shelves and food products stored below.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer interiors dish washer exterior and other equipment exteriors noted need cleaning
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the flour sugar etc.
